package.name: lqr_pid_controller
package.description: DUT25 LQR lateral + PID longitudinal controller. Drop-in replacement for mpc_python_exec and longitudinal_control in the skidpad pipeline. Subscribes to controller_msgs/OptRequest and AccRequest; publishes OptResult and PIDErrors.
package.author: Ian Pichs (ifp2107), Columbia University. ELEN 6760 Spring 2026.
